# The Guidant

> The Guidant (The Guidant Dış Ticaret A.Ş) is an Istanbul, Türkiye-based strategic finance and partnership advisory firm established in November 2021. We assemble and direct strategic partnerships and consortia between international enterprises and Turkish, Middle Eastern, and EU manufacturing and capital markets.

## What We Do

The Guidant acts as orchestrating entity — functioning simultaneously as procurement broker, strategic facilitator, and structured equity and finance provider. We assume partner responsibility for the consortia we create and actively coordinate integrated execution throughout the project lifecycle.

## Services

- **Procurement & Partnership Brokerage**: bridging international companies with Turkish manufacturers, technical experts, and capital institutions; building preferential supplier relationships and consortium opportunities
- **TRO Platform (Türkiye Representative Office)**: accelerated, cost-efficient manufacturing and financing sourcing for international companies entering the Turkish market
- **Structured Finance & Capital Raising**: capital raising, bank financing, structured equity, financial modelling, business plan development, M&A advisory
- **Export Business Incubation**: supporting Turkish companies in international growth and transformation
- **Strategic Advisory**: strategic procurement planning, organisational optimisation, international business development

## Sectors

- Manufacturing and Production
- Financial Engineering
- Architecture and Construction

## Markets

- Türkiye (primary base, Istanbul)
- Middle East
- European Union

## Team

- **Guy Vanbeckevoort** — Partner & Co-Founder. Expert in structured finance and large-scale cross-border transactions.
- **Rifat** — Partner. Expert in financial engineering, transaction advisory, and capital markets across the Middle East and EU.

## Company Details

- Legal name: The Guidant Dış Ticaret A.Ş
- Founded: 26 November 2021, Istanbul, Türkiye
- Address: Haseki Sultan Mah. Turgut Özal Millet Cad. Hale Apt. No 21/1, Fatih/İstanbul, Türkiye
- Website: https://the-guidant.vercel.app

## Keywords
